title: Vaangana Vanakangana Lyrics Thalaivaa Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
What bro ?, nadanam ?
song ah? ..baangu..
yaar anngae.. bro-ku oru baangu

Vaangana vanakangana
my song-a ne kelungana
naa olrala olaralana
romba feelingu feelinguna

Hey aanaana oohnaana
un aala thaedi pova
nee venaanu ponaina
nee dhevadhaasaa aava
ava late-ah thaana
tata solluva pinnaala pogaadha

Ye oothiko oothiko oothikona
manasa ne konjam thaethikana
Quater-u water-u serndhuchuna
kottudhu kadhal thathuvamna

Vaangana vanakangana
my song-a ne kelungana
naa olrala olaralana
romba feelingu feelinguna

Life-u oru boatukanga
safety-ah otungana
love-ula maattikitta
sethula sikkidumna

Hittler-u torture ellaam
history pesudhunna
ivalunga torture ellaam
yaaarumey pesalanna
(factu factu)

Whisky bear bodhathaan
mooney hour-il pogumna
hasky voice-il pesuva
pogaadhu andha podhanna

Ye oothiko oothiko oothikona
manasa ne konjam thaethikana
Quater-u water-u serndhuchuna
kottudhu kadhal thathuvamna

Vaangana vanakangana
my song-a ne kelungana
naa olrala olaralana
romba feelingu feelinguna

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Vaangana Vanakangana conveys a sense of celebration and joy, inviting listeners to enjoy life and dance.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Thalaivaa, the song is a lively number that showcases the protagonist's charismatic personality and his connection with the audience.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Vijay and composed by GV PrakashKumar.

When was the song released?

Vaangana Vanakangana was released on May 1, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Vaangana Vanakangana, the vibrant energy of the song reflects the celebratory spirit of Thalaivaa. The lyrics evoke feelings of joy and excitement, making it a perfect anthem for parties and celebrations. Vijay's dynamic performance adds to the song's infectious charm, inviting everyone to join in the fun. This track encapsulates the essence of youth and exuberance, leaving listeners with a sense of happiness and motivation.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vaangana Vanakangana is a vibrant anthem that perfectly captures the essence of celebration and joy. With Vijay's electrifying vocals and GV PrakashKumar's catchy beats, this track is sure to get everyone on their feet. Dive into the world of Thalaivaa and experience the infectious energy of this unforgettable song!
stanzaMeanings: What bro? Is this a dance song? Come on... who is this? It's for my bro.
What? Again a dance song? Where is our song?
Come listen to my song, I have a lot of feelings about it.
Hey, you are the one I want. If you want to go, you should go. Don't say later that you will come back.
Hey, calm down. Your mind needs to relax a bit. If you mix quarter and water, it becomes a love potion.
Come listen to my song, I have a lot of feelings about it.
Life is like a boat; if you don't secure it safely, love can get lost.
Hitler's torture is all history, but if they talk about torture, no one speaks up (that's a fact).
Whiskey bear, when the moon is out, it doesn't speak in a husky voice at that time.
Did you see? I won't fall for that.
Hey, calm down. Your mind needs to relax a bit. If you mix quarter and water, it becomes a love potion.
Come listen to my song, I have a lot of feelings about it.
Yes, yes, go ahead, go ahead...
